script_text: Every word needs at least one vowel.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Each vowel makes a short sound. A is for apple.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: E is for egg. I is for igloo.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: O is for octopus. U is for umbrella.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Which vowel do you hear in the word 'cat'?
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: The vowel in cat is A.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: What about 'dog'? The vowel is O.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.
